name: Eighter From Decatur Pickleball Club
description: Come play pickleball at Eighter From Decatur Pickleball Club in Decatur, TX! There is 1 outdoor concrete court. This is a dedicated court with a permanent net and lines. You can reserve the court. The court is private. Players have access to lights, a pro shop or equipment store, trainers or lessons, and restrooms.

name: Fit N Wise Decatur
description: Come play pickleball at Fit N Wise Decatur in Decatur, TX! There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. You can reserve the courts. Players have access to restrooms. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Power Pickle
description: Power Pickle is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Rhome, TX. There are 3 indoor hard and concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like lights, trainers or lessons, wheelchair accessibility, water, restrooms, food, youth programming, and a pro shop or equipment store. You can reserve the courts. A one-time fee is required to play.
fees: Fee required — You can pay at the door or online on our website, we suggest paying online to reserve a court, this way you can see if the courts are available.
